hero.headline: Building scalable products with Java & React
hero.subtext: Tech Lead focused on clean architecture, developer experience and modern frontend engineering.

motd.quote-2: If you can’t explain it, you shouldn’t ship it.
motd.quote-3: The best solution is the one you don’t need to explain.
motd.quote-4: Life is like a Git repository, nothing is going to change if you don't commit and push forward.
motd.quote-5: Master the concepts. The syntax will follow.
motd.quote-6: If you know the why, the syntax is trivial.
motd.quote-8: What you ship shapes what comes next.

mlb.title: MESBG List Builder
mlb.description: The List Builder is a progressive web application for the Middle-earth Strategy Battle Game that enables users to create, validate, and manage army lists, track live matches, and maintain their miniature collections.

inventory.title: Mini Inventory
inventory.description: The inventory is an PWA which helps hobbyists manage their miniature collection and “pile of shame” by tracking owned, unassembled, and painted models in a structured way. It enables users to turn their often overwhelming paint-backlog into a clear, actionable overview.

plugins.title: Runelite Plugins
plugins.description: I've created two RuneLite plugins that enhance both solo and cooperative gameplay within Old School RuneScape. Leveraged RuneLite’s plugin API to build lightweight, event-driven overlays to extend the game with additional features.
